heading: Tuesday Night
text: Areas of fog giving way to sun, mixed with clouds. A stray shower northeast late.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: A stray shower northeast. Mainly clear. Patches of fog late.

heading: Thursday
text: Some sun, then increasing clouds. Afternoon showers, mainly in New York.

heading: Friday
text: Morning showers, then breaks of sun. Scattered afternoon showers and storms.
